title: aira arctica
intro: Aira arctica, also known as Snowy Woodrush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to the Arctic regions of Europe, Asia, and North America. The medicinal properties of Aira arctica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and reduce oxidative stress. The health benefits of Aira arctica include its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory, reducing swelling and pain, as well as its potential to help with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Aira arctica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile addition to natural remedies and homeopathic treatments.
